overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence showing a character walking through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The environment features neon-lit billboards, industrial smokestacks, wet reflective streets, and heavy atmospheric haze with persistent rainfall throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with chain-link fence and neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk next to an industrial chain-link fence

entered.detail: large neon billboard with purple and pink text mounted on industrial scaffolding
tall metal security fence running along the right side of the sidewalk
skyscraper with illuminated number 12 near the top visible through the rain
overhead traffic signal structure spanning the street ahead
wooden utility poles with multiple overhead wires

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow rain-soaked sidewalk bordered by a chain-link fence on the right and neon-lit buildings on the left. The wet pavement reflects the purple and pink neon signs, while a tall tower with the number 12 looms in the foggy distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: large wet intersection with traffic infrastructure

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green allowing pedestrian crossing
character begins crossing the wide wet intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at the traffic light then crossing the wide rain-slicked street as the signal changes

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking on the opposite side of the intersection

entered.detail: tall industrial chimney emitting smoke into the rainy sky
large illuminated advertising screen showing animated content
raised concrete highway structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a wide intersection and waits for the traffic light to change from red to green before crossing. Industrial smokestacks become visible in the distance, and the wet asphalt reflects the neon lights while the character traverses the open crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial plaza with smokestacks and overhead structures

events.description: character turns left while walking through the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza with industrial smokestacks ahead and large billboards visible

entered.detail: large industrial facility with multiple structures and metal piping
concrete industrial building with colorful graffiti on the lower walls

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an open industrial plaza, turning slightly left while passing between large industrial buildings. The smokestack looms closer, emitting smoke into the rainy air, while digital billboards shift from right to left in the field of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk next to graffiti-covered industrial building

events.description: passing close by a pedestrian with a glowing orange umbrella

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing industrial buildings with colorful graffiti and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person holding a glowing orange umbrella walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall street lamp with orange glowing light illuminating the rain
three large vertical digital screens displaying a woman's face in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk next to an industrial building covered in colorful graffiti, passing a pedestrian with a glowing orange umbrella. In the distance, three large vertical holographic displays become visible, showing a woman's face against the rainy backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with large holographic displays and elevated highway

events.description: black SUV with bright headlights drives past from left to right
character stops walking and stands still to observe the surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking along the street then stopping to observe the large holographic displays ahead

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past with bright headlights illuminating the wet street
figure standing near the holographic displays in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the open street as a black SUV passes by with headlights cutting through the rain. Approaching the three large holographic displays, the character slows and stops to observe the massive screens showing a woman's face, with the elevated highway structure visible behind them.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that transitions from narrow neon-lit corridors to a wide industrial plaza dominated by massive holograms. It begins on a cramped sidewalk where purple and pink neon signs reflect off wet pavement, moving toward a distant tower shrouded in fog. As the character reaches a wide intersection and crosses the reflective asphalt, the view expands to reveal towering industrial smokestacks emitting smoke into the rainy air. The scene then shifts through an open plaza and past graffiti-covered walls and a pedestrian with a glowing orange umbrella, while digital billboards slide across the field of vision. Finally, the camera follows the character past a black SUV with piercing headlights toward three colossal holographic displays of a woman's face set against the backdrop of an elevated highway.
